commit.message:
Fix signed int16_t overflow in differential drive mixing

Use int32_t intermediates for throttle +/- steeringOffset before
constraining back to int16_t. Prevents undefined behavior when
sum exceeds int16_t range.

commit.message:
Restore direct initializer + metadata that was actually working

The git diff shows build 155 (4 successes) used:
- AlarmManager.AlarmConfiguration() direct initializer
- metadata: EmptyAlarmMetadata() parameter
- nonisolated struct with explicit init()

I wrongly reverted to factory method .alarm() thinking it was what
worked, but the factory method WITHOUT metadata is what broke it.
Purge v9 clears stale state.

Fix stale dashboard cache after sessions-exhausted migration

The data migration used raw DB::table() which bypasses Eloquent events,
leaving student dashboard caches stale. Now clears dashboard, private
sessions, and circles caches for each affected student after update.

Also manually cleared cache for student 194 (circle 88) on production.

Add bot analytics v2, AEO tracking, migration runner, dashboard teaser, and AI insights

Bot analytics plugin:
- Two-table model: daily aggregates (90-day retention) + recent ring buffer (7-day / 500-row cap)
- Upsert pattern for daily counts; async pruning on every write
- AI insights server action with rate limiting and auth checks
- Rebuilt AdminPage with resource type breakdown, recent visits table, and InsightsButton

AEO endpoint tracking:
- New request:bot-visit action hook in hook-catalogue
- Bot detection injected into llms.txt, llms-full.txt, and [slug]/llms.txt route handlers
- sitemap.ts and robots.ts converted to route handlers (sitemap.xml/route.ts, robots.txt/route.ts) to gain Request access for bot tracking

Bot detection utilities:
- src/lib/bot-detection.ts — shared detectBot(), classifyPath(), BOT_CONFIG, BOT_PATTERNS
- 13 bots: ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini, Amazonbot, Meta, Cohere, CCBot + 5 search spiders
- AI bots checked before search bots to prevent Google-Extended matching Googlebot

Migration runner:
- scripts/run-migrations.ts — schema_migrations tracking table, alphabetical scan, skip applied
- scripts/migrate-007-bot-analytics-v2.ts — backfills daily from old visits table, drops old table
- package.json db:migrate simplified to single command

Dashboard teaser:
- BotAnalyticsTeaser component — AI Crawlers, Search Spiders, Top Content cards
- Linked to /admin/bot-analytics; graceful empty states; try/catch for fresh installs
- Renders below Getting Started checklist on admin dashboard

Test suite additions:
- tests/bot-analytics.test.ts — BOT_CONFIG/BOT_PATTERNS alignment, detectBot, classifyPath
- tests/hook-manager.test.ts — 14 tests for HookManager action/filter/introspection
- tests/migration-runner.test.ts — filename regex and sort order tests
- 226 tests passing, TypeScript clean

commit.message:
fix: use VStack instead of LazyVStack for chat message list

LazyVStack defers rendering until items are visible on screen. When
createPanel() computes fittingSize before the panel is displayed,
LazyVStack reports near-zero content height, making initial messages
invisible. Switching to VStack ensures all messages are measured
immediately.

Also set activePanel before makeKeyAndOrderFront to prevent transient
IME deactivation from clearing chat state via cancelLLMMode.

commit.message:
Subscription system: fix, optimize & extend (6 issues)

Phase 1 - Bug Fixes:
- Issue 1: PaymentReconciliationService unifies payment + subscription
  confirmation atomically (was disconnected between Filament and Payment)
- Issue 2: Duplicate prevention - cancelDuplicatePending at all creation
  points, payment idempotency, 24h/2h cleanup, DB unique constraint via
  virtual is_pending_flag column
- Issue 3: Sessions exhausted no longer auto-pauses - sets metadata flag
  instead, distinct "Sessions Completed" badge, data migration for
  existing wrongly-PAUSED subscriptions

Phase 2 - Renewal Infrastructure:
- previous_subscription_id column on all subscription tables
- SubscriptionRenewalService with smart date logic (sessions exhausted →
  now(); early renewal → old end date; session carryover)
- SubscriptionTypeResolver eliminates getModelClass() duplication
- PricingResolver eliminates pricing calculation duplication

Phase 3 - Features:
- Issue 4: Renew/resubscribe actions in Filament, /manage panel, and API
- Issue 5: Admin subscription wizard (Livewire) at /manage/subscriptions/create
- Issue 6: Resubscribe for dormant subscriptions with teacher availability check
- ExpireActiveSubscriptions respects pending renewals

Code quality improvements:
- useSession/returnSession consolidated in BaseSubscription (single UPDATE)
- Double-lock removed from CountsTowardsSubscription
- N+1 fixed in QuranSubscription::getTeacher() (uses relationship)
- canRenew() aligned between model/enum/service (includes SUSPENDED)
- All hardcoded strings replaced with __() localization (93 new keys)
- Cross-tenant security: academy-scoped validation in Livewire component

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Redesign mass entry as spreadsheet table; fix landscape printing

- Replace card-per-entry layout with compact spreadsheet-style table
- Collapsed rows: Date, Reg, Aircraft Type, ATA, Task Detail, Save/expand
- Expanded panel: Experience Type, Licence Category, Employer, Job Number, ATA search, Task Types, full Task Detail textarea
- ATA cell shows selected chapter chip or "+ Add ATA" to open expand
- Aircraft type autocomplete preserved in inline cell
- Change @page CSS to `size: A4 landscape` and remove manual-step warning

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: exclude pdfkit from Next.js bundling so font paths resolve correctly

pdfkit loads its embedded fonts (Helvetica etc.) via __dirname-relative
paths at runtime. When Next.js bundles it, __dirname points to the
output dir and the font files are not found, causing PDF generation
to fail with an error. Adding pdfkit to serverExternalPackages keeps
it as a native Node.js module.

Review fixes: hide exception details from users, use PaymentStatus enum, DRY connection options

- Replace $e->getMessage() with generic localized error in all catch blocks
  (confirmPayment, renew, resubscribe actions + API/supervisor controllers)
- Add report($e) before generic error to preserve server-side logging
- Use PaymentStatus::PENDING enum instead of raw 'pending' string
- Extract connectionOptions into getConnectionOptions() method (DRY)
- Skip camera permission pre-check (camera starts OFF, avoids Safari light flicker)
- Add generic_error localization key to ar/en lang files

commit.message:
feat(workflow-documents): restore plan.md artifact generation via KV watcher

Rewrites the orphaned workflow-documents component from a dead JetStream
consumer (nothing published to output.workflow.documents after ADR-026)
to a PLAN_STATES KV watcher that writes plan.md + plan.json at key
milestones for human review and git audit trails.

- Delete dead code: markdown.go, payloads.go (DocumentOutputPayload
  pipeline with zero publishers)
- New plan_renderer.go: RenderPlan produces markdown with goal, context,
  scope, requirements (with depends_on), scenarios (Given/When/Then),
  and review history (iteration, verdict, findings from ADR-029)
- Component watches PLAN_STATES KV, filters for 7 milestone statuses:
  drafted, requirements_generated, scenarios_generated, reviewed,
  scenarios_reviewed, ready_for_execution, complete
- Writes .semspec/plans/{slug}/plan.md + plan.json on each milestone
- Slug validation before file write (defense in depth)
- Config simplified to just plan_state_bucket (default PLAN_STATES)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Replace all 65 browser alert() calls with toast notification system
- Remove error.message from 35 API responses (prevent info leakage)
- Add maxDuration to 10 long-running API routes (cron, export, reconciliation)
- Add structured logger utility, migrate 6 sensitive API routes from console.log

consistent naming across all agents (Claude, Codex, OpenCode, etc).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix microphone not working: release getUserMedia streams + add audio defaults

Root cause: setupMediaPermissions() called getUserMedia({ audio: true }) to
trigger browser permission but never released the stream. The orphaned stream
held a device lock, causing LiveKit SDK's setMicrophoneEnabled(true) to fail
silently on mobile and some desktop browsers.

Fixes:
- Store getUserMedia result and immediately stop all tracks after permission granted
- For camera: use permissions.query() API (no device lock) with getUserMedia fallback
- Remove unnecessary setMicrophoneEnabled(false) for students (already default)
- Add audioCaptureDefaults (echoCancellation, noiseSuppression, autoGainControl)
  to room connection options in both connect() and reconnect()
- Add dtx + audioBitrate to publishDefaults

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: two-step AI prompt — first identify category standards, then filter

Asks Sonnet to first determine what value formats are standard for
the specific product category, then filter. This prevents removing
jeans W/L sizes while still cleaning up duplicates with suffixes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(ci): use build number in MSIX version instead of hardcoded .0

MSIX was always created with version x.y.z.0 regardless of build number,
causing Windows to block reinstalls with "same identity but different contents".
Now uses the actual build number as the 4th version segment.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: set activePanel before makeKeyAndOrderFront to prevent race condition

When createPanel() called makeKeyAndOrderFront before setting activePanel,
the transient IME deactivation triggered by the key window change would
find chatWindowController.isVisible == false (activePanel still nil),
causing cancelLLMMode() to clear messages and callbacks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: reforma total — Go backend API + Next.js frontend puro

## Cambios principales

### Go Backend (rnv-go-api/)
- API REST completa en Go con Gin framework
- JWT auth (cookie rnv_session compatible con frontend existente)
- GORM + PostgreSQL (todos los modelos del schema Prisma)
- WebSocket SSH terminal interactiva (PTY real con gorilla/websocket)
- SSH exec/test/info con golang.org/x/crypto/ssh
- Monitor VPS en background goroutines (cada 5 min)
- Hostinger API con cache in-memory
- Odoo XML-RPC client portado
- Email via gomail/v2 SMTP
- Audit logging en todos los endpoints
- Notificaciones automáticas (VPS offline, backups)
- Scheduler: cleanup sessions/notificaciones expiradas

### Docker Architecture (4 contenedores)
- db: PostgreSQL 16
- go-api: Go binary ~15MB (vs ~300MB Node.js anterior)
- nextjs: Frontend puro sin API routes
- nginx: Reverse proxy (/api/* → Go, /* → Next.js)
- backup: pg_dump diario

### Next.js (frontend puro)
- Eliminadas todas las API routes (31 archivos)
- Eliminadas libs server-side (prisma, bcryptjs, ssh2, nodemailer, odoo)
- Nuevo src/lib/api.ts — cliente tipado del Go API
- Middleware simplificado (solo protección de páginas)

commit.message:
Add BMS projection model: 885 suppression events documented

Model built from 480 good readings (normal mi/% ratio).
885 bad readings flagged where BMS is suppressing range.
Worst case: 100% battery showing 7mi (projected 154mi) = 95% suppressed.
Every future reading can be compared against projection.

Add 54 screenshot data points Mar 13-31 with BMS bug evidence

Critical BMS bug instances documented:
- IMG_1334: 80% at 100% limit (20% short)
- IMG_1356: 83% at 100% limit (17% short)
- IMG_1391-1396: 2mi/~1% at 50-100% limit (smoking gun sequence)
- IMG_1422: 71% at 90% limit (19% short)
- IMG_1482: 24% at 90% limit (66% short!)
- IMG_1524: 22mi at 100% limit
- IMG_1552: 78% at 90% limit (12% short)
- IMG_1597-1604: Red cable fault, 0V/0A, charging stopped at 77%
- IMG_1609: 64% at 90% limit, DROPPED from 77% during "charging"

16 of 20 "Charging Complete" events show car below charge limit.

fix: añadir User-Agent Chrome a HttpGetDocument para que Streamtape no bloquee el scraping

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

v0.2: Query expansion + reranking (proper architecture) (#2215)

Architecture follows v0.1 pattern — intelligence layer wraps substrate:
  1. Embed query (before substrate — v0.1)
  2. Expand query (before substrate — v0.2 NEW)
  3. substrate::retrieve (model-free, unchanged)
  4. Rerank results (after substrate — v0.2 NEW)

New intelligence modules (not dumped into handler):
- crates/intelligence/src/expand.rs: expand_query() with grammar-
  constrained generation, hallucination guard, strong signal detection
- crates/intelligence/src/rerank.rs: rerank_hits() with cross-encoder
  scoring and configurable position-aware blending

Recipe extensions:
- ExpansionConfig: strategy, strong_signal_threshold/gap,
  min_shared_stems, original_weight
- RerankConfig: top_n, BlendingConfig (rank_1_3/4_10/11_plus)
- BlendWeights configurable via recipe (not hardcoded)

Search handler stays thin — orchestrates:
- try_expand_query() → calls intelligence::expand
- multi_pass_retrieve() → one substrate call per variant
- fuse_multi_pass() → reuses substrate::rrf_fuse (now pub)
- rerank_hits() → calls intelligence::rerank

Tests: 91 search crate tests pass, expand/rerank unit tests included.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
